source: Goliath Roofing of Florida, NOAA, Florida OIR

hurricanes.name: Andrew
hurricanes.impact: Led to creation of HVHZ and modern FBC

hurricanes.name: Wilma
hurricanes.impact: Widespread tile and shingle damage across South FL

hurricanes.name: Irma
hurricanes.impact: Largest FL insurance event since Andrew

hurricanes.name: Michael
hurricanes.impact: Panhandle devastation, some South FL damage
